data.title: Helen and Jacob Shaham make landmark gift to FIU Medicine
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, Florida International University and Herbert Wertheim College of Medicine (FIU Medicine) disclosed today that they have received an unprecedented $30 million donation from philanthropists Helen and Jacob Shaham. This substantial contribution highlights the Shahams' dedication to supporting academia and medical advancements. As a result of this generous gift, the academic medical center is set to undergo significant transformations and enhancements.

data.title: SEMI Reports Global Semiconductor Equipment Billings Reached $135 Billion in 2025, Up 15% Year-on-Year
data.description: In 2025, the global sales of semiconductor manufacturing equipment skyrocketed by 15% to a record $135.1 billion from the previous year's $117.1 billion. The surge in demand was fueled by the growing need for AI technology, advanced logic, and memory solutions. This remarkable growth was reported from MILPITAS, Calif., announced on April 7, 2026.

data.title: Diebold Nixdorf Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Diebold Nixdorf Inc. (NYSE: DBD) announced that it will take the place of Sealed Air Corp. (NYSE: SEE) in the S&P SmallCap 600 index before trading begins on Friday, April 10. The change comes as Clayton, Dubilier & Rice LLC finalizes its acquisition of Sealed Air, a deal that is anticipated to be finished soon. This move reflects a significant shift in the stock market landscape, with Diebold Nixdorf's stock likely to experience notable changes in the coming days due to this development.

data.title: Elon Musk Gives Intel The AI Foundry Stamp It's Been Chasing
data.description: Intel Corp. (INTC) received a significant endorsement for its foundry ambitions from Elon Musk, leading to a rise in Intel's shares. The company has now joined the Terafab project with SpaceX, xAI, and Tesla Inc. (TSLA). This partnership places Intel at the forefront of Musk's latest venture to revolutionize silicon fabrication technology. Intel's expertise in designing, manufacturing, and packaging high-performance chips at scale will aid Terafab in achieving its objective of producing 1 terawatt of compute annually to propel advancements in AI and robotics. Additionally, Intel recently hosted Musk at its facilities, indicating a deepening collaboration beyond a mere partnership. This move is seen as a crucial moment in cultivating a strategic relationship with one of the largest potential buyers of AI-compute globally. The visible support from Musk validates Intel's manufacturing roadmap, emphasizing the significance of this development for investors.

data.title: Notice of Data Security Incident
data.description: In TOMS RIVER, N.J. on April 7, 2026, Shore Gardens Rehabilitation and Nursing Center, LLC emphasized their dedication to safeguarding personal information following a recent data security incident. The center prioritizes privacy and security and is taking necessary steps to address the situation. The incident has raised concerns about the protection of personal data.

data.title: Wallets hold over 4M Bitcoin as network activity signals 'bull phase', indicating positive market development.
data.description: The amount of Bitcoin stored in wallets belonging to long-term investors has surpassed 4 million BTC. Additionally, a network activity index has signaled a shift into a "bull phase."

data.title: The Story of Canada Through the Stories of Immigrant Nationbuilders
data.description: In Toronto, Canada, a partnership between Canadian Immigrant magazine and Western Union is commemorating the 18th year of honoring the contributions made by immigrants to the country's economy, innovation, and culture. As part of the celebration, they acknowledge the individuals who have chosen Canada as their new home to establish their careers and families. This initiative highlights the integral role immigrants play in shaping a stronger and more self-reliant nation.

data.title: Tamboran Resources Corporation Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Tamboran Resources Corporation (NYSE: TBN, ASX: TBN) based in New York has announced an offering of securities, with details available in the prospectus supplement and base prospectus filed with the SEC. Interested parties can access the preliminary prospectus supplement and base prospectus for free on the SEC's website under Tamboran’s name or through the joint book-running managers like RBC Cap. This offering is subject to SEC regulations and guidelines and is essential for those looking to invest in Tamboran Resources Corporation.

data.title: Avra at Metropolitan Naples Defines Luxury Downtown High-rise Living in Southwest Florida
data.description: Located in Naples, Florida, a new residential enclave rises 15 stories above Fifth Avenue South and Davis Boulevard. Situated in the heart of downtown, residents have direct access to the area.
